STR: +2 HP: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Does not drop
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2003 at 4:38 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
For anyone who thinks they will camp Grachnist and get this earring, forget it. If it drops its rare as hell, I have spent probably 250 RL hours camping Grach and have looted 11 SGSE's and about the same number of totems. This earring has never dropped, I have never talked to anyone who had this earring nor have I seen this for sale.

Also forget about getting any of the scaled wolf armor from him in all that time Ive seen maybe 4 pieces drop and the stats suck anyway.

58 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Venerable Aggrok

Go get the Broken Fang Earring
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 2:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592347536213
View User Forum
25 posts
This DOES drop and it is fairly easy to get. The only requirement is that the Wolves are in the Owlbear Caves from the on going war there. The result is a 5AC 5Str -10Cha earring. Basicly it is a Sarnack Earring of Station with negative Charisma. But it does drop and the Mob is alot easier then Grachnist

QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2002 at 5:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768234605
View User Forum
6 posts
I camped Grachnist the Destroyer for 2 evenings.

I killed about 22 every evening. I looted 1 Totem , lots of gloves, 1 Grachnits Skull and one jade earring.

I pressume that the jade earring is the new earring drop.

Who could recently loot an earring with "grim aura" effect from the Grachnist?

These don't drop any more. They are better IMO than the Sarnak Earring of Station, which is a real pain in the butt to get.

RE: price
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 7:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775119867
84 posts
Orc Fang Earing is 3ac 3str 15hp. I'm not sure what you've been smoking, but I'd say this earing is better. But the extra 2ac is definately not worth 1k. The reason the price on these is so high is because they're more rare than you going on a date. Agreed, it is a pointless earing. But a trinket I wouldn't mind having nonetheless.
Luck in battle,
Bulvar Biggins
Dwarf Warrior
Divine Union of Souls

QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2002 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756564350
Scholar
33 posts
Bery Bery rare.
▲ Page top
RE: rarity
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 8:54 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758775332
Scholar
30 posts
I do and I don't understand the value of "rare" items. A few weeks back, I was out to buy a robe for my friend's newbie enchanter, saw one that i figured would top at 100p max because of its stats, so that's what I offered. I was laughed at and told that it was "rare" and could be sold at no less than 500p... OK, it's rare, fine... but it's not as good as other items that sell for say 200p because they are more common...

I would rather have the better item for cheaper, than the worse, yet "rare" item for more... makes no sense to me...

It is understandable that widely available items drop in price quickly, because they flood the market... but think about it: goals in the game are to upgrade your equipment, not wear something that is rare.

Just my thoughts...
Baron Hershiser Lilydale
51 Cavalier
Questors Moy
Cazic Thule
▲ Page top
neat
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2001 at 12:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251657155
10 posts
whos the fool that said this is no drop?? I Just got one not 10 minuets ago. Rogue lvl 23 Skyller,just killing giants when someone shouts any one want this earing? I got one already. I say heck why not, i go over there and woot i get this bad *** earing! And, being the rogue that i am if you need one send me a tell on The Rathe you can have it, i got something better by now anyways. =p Have fun be safe... DONT DIE!.

Peace out yo

# Nov 01 2001 at 11:27 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
93 posts
Three of us spent a combined 20 hours today in Warslik's Woods on Druzzil Ro. We were spread out, 2 looking for the SGSE, myself hoping for this Earring of Grachnist. The SGSE dropped but not this.
This is so rare most people that farm for the SGSE don't even know it exists.

▲ Page top
Skull of Grachnist
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2001 at 9:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750557739
3 posts
Anyone know what this is for? I got one camping the earring. Its Lore No Drop so leads me to believe its a quest item, but Ive yet to see any mention of this

Ssithiuss Ssilversside
55 Iksar Warrior of Rodcet Nife
▲ Page top
RE: Skull of Grachnist
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 5:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749904034
View User Forum
Guru
145 posts
The head of Grachnist the Destroyer is a item for the Iksar Shadowknight Dreadscale Greaves. The little bugger's head, the boots from a named Sarnak in OT, a pair of banded greaves, plus a ruby (I think) will net you a nice pair of Iksar Shadowknight only pants.

/em begins rant - Of course I have never seen them because the boots are a ultra rare drop off a rare spawn...what does Verant expect of us? That we spend all of two levels camping ruins in OT in while getting trampled by rhinos and roaming Sarnak Knights in the hopes that by some freaking miracle these boots will drop?

/em breaths slowly...blood pressure dropping...remembering this is just a game.

I feel better. Good hunting all.

Shrikke - Iksar Shadowknight
Bristlebane
▲ Page top
RE: Skull of Grachnist

__DEL__1591761082428

40 posts

twice

# Aug 25 2001 at 10:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246566703

31 posts
I am not completly sure if the skull is the quest item for a trooper scale quest but i know it is a drop off of grachnist that gets you a quest item for trooper scale, comeon your a 55 warrior you should know about trooper scale quests (then again i could be wrong)

Skinless Skalehide 22lvl Iksar Warrior (Crusader of torvo)

RE: Skull of Grachnist

# Sep 02 2001 at 12:34 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The item for the Trooper Scale quest drops off Dob the Pitfighter(his tongue), who spawns around Grachnist, not Grachnist himself.
▲ Page top
This Earring is Very Rare.
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 2:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765614527
Scholar
20 posts
I have killed 76 Grachnist and managed to get my Shrunken Goblin Skull Earing. In that time I saw 4 skulls and 3 totems one the one Goblin Earring. I have never seen this earring or heard of anyone else that has seen it. I know 3 other people that have spent just as much time, or more, camping this guy for their SGSE. They had less luck then me with totems and skulls. I think I might have gotten lucky on my drops. All in all I would have to say if you kill 100 of these, you will most likely get the Shrunken earring. I have no idea how you get this thing to drop.

not bad
